creator: max@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The submitted change is committed with the following changes: 

Combined patch-ag and patch-ad since they both change the same file. 

Remove the part of patch-ad where it makes the Makefile to compress 
the manpage.  Instead, defined MAN1 in the port Makefile. 

Also changed HAS_CONFIGURE in the port Makfile to GNU_CONFIGURE  
so that the port respects the PREFIX. 

Since patch-ag was combined into patch-ad, renamed patch-a[h-j] to 
patch-a[g-i].
